summary: Onboarding flow tested end-to-end. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed (funnel, insights static+LLM RU fallback, verify-code 888/123/ab, profile save with/without code, missing-field 400/422, brief+Hermes RU reply, profile persistence with brief, 404). Hermes brief built in ~7-12s — Russian 4-block reply rendered with all required fields. Frontend: OnboardingFlow modal opens via the `nxt8:open-onboarding` custom event; intro splash (Start the test) appears first then Q1. All 7 questions answered, insights ('FOR YOU') appear after industry, team_size, first pain pick, first tools pick, goal_90days, urgency. Code 888 validation works (onb-code-valid marker + 'CODE ACCEPTED · PILOT 2026'). localStorage 'nxt8.onboarding.v1' persists progress. HOWEVER multiple spec-required data-testids are MISSING in the DOM, blocking automated verification of the reply UI.

minor.issue: Missing required field (pydantic) returns 422, not the 400 mentioned in spec. Sending empty industry='' returns 400 via business validator. Both behaviours are acceptable but inconsistent.

ui_bugs.issue: Final 'send' submit button is missing data-testid='onb-submit' — only onb-next exists (it appears to be re-purposed as submit on Q7). Spec explicitly requires onb-submit.
Missing testids onb-processing-step-0..3 — none are present in DOM after submit; cannot verify processing animation.

All reply testids are missing: onb-reply, onb-reply-block1..4, onb-team-card-{i}, onb-reply-30d-{i}, onb-reply-cta. Backend brief endpoint returns the correct payload — but the UI does not expose the testids required by the test harness, so success cannot be automated.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking pain_primary=leads_lost then pain_primary=chaos OVERWRITES the first instead of capturing two values (primary + secondary). After two clicks localStorage shows {pain_primary:'chaos', pain_secondary:''}. Spec says 'multi-select up to 2: leads_lost + chaos'.

issues: Progress percentage text in top-right looks like '168%' / clipped (likely '100%' truncated by close icon overlap on Q7). Minor visual glitch.

action_items: Add data-testid='onb-submit' to the final 'send' button on the contact step (currently uses onb-next).
Render and expose processing-step UI with data-testid='onb-processing-step-0'..'onb-processing-step-3'.

Add data-testids to the Hermes reply screen: onb-reply (container), onb-reply-block1..4, onb-team-card-{i} (one per profession card), onb-reply-30d-{i} (each item in block3), onb-reply-cta (CTA button).
Fix pain multi-select so primary + secondary are both captured when user picks two distinct options (currently the second click overwrites the first).
Fix progress-percentage label overlap with close icon on Q7 (small visual clip).
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingFlow.jsx: spec defines a rich testid contract (see agent_to_agent_context_note) but only ~14 of ~25 expected testids are wired. Treat that block of testids as a hard contract and add the missing ones in one pass.

agents/onboarding.py REQUIRED_FIELDS validation runs only after pydantic — and pydantic already declares industry/team_size/pain_primary/goal_90days/name as required (no default). So missing-field calls return 422, not the 400 declared in spec. Either drop pydantic defaults to allow empty strings through, or update spec to mention 422.

build_brief() defaults pain_secondary='chaos' when not provided AND no chaos already in list — combined with the front-end bug above this can mask the missing secondary pain from end users (they will still see Ops Director card even though they never picked chaos).

Hermes reply LLM call has no client-side timeout caller-side; the FE waits 80s. If DeepSeek is slow the user is stuck on processing — consider streaming or a 30s soft-timeout that falls back to the deterministic _fallback_reply payload (already implemented backend-side; just needs to be surfaced faster).
seed_data_creation: Three TEST_-prefixed client_profiles created via backend tests (TEST_Alex, TEST_NoCodeUser, TEST_BriefUser). Access code 888 used_count incremented by ~1 per code-bearing test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend onboarding APIs are stable; rerun /app/backend/tests/test_onboarding.py for regression. Frontend OnboardingFlow modal opens correctly via window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('nxt8:open-onboarding')) — but you MUST first click the intro splash 'Start the test' / 'Начать тест' before Q1 testids appear. The agent-to-agent testid contract in the review request is partly NOT honoured (onb-submit, onb-processing-step-*, onb-reply*, onb-team-card-*, onb-reply-30d-*, onb-reply-cta all missing). Once main agent adds those testids, the rest of the happy-path script will pass.
rca of the issue: Frontend dev only wired testids on the question/input/nav elements (onb-q-*, onb-opt-*, onb-input-*, onb-next, onb-back, onb-code-valid). The submit button on the contact step reuses onb-next instead of branching to onb-submit. The processing and reply screens were rendered without any data-testid attributes at all — likely because they are conditional sub-components added later and not covered by the testid pass. Fix is purely additive: add the testids per the contract in the review request.
